title: iris × spectabilis
intro: Iris × spectabilis, also known as the Large-flowered Iris or Dalmatian Iris, is a hybrid flowering plant that combines the characteristics of the Iris pallida and Iris variegata species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iris × spectabilis include reducing swelling and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant's rhizomes and roots can be used in teas, tinctures, and ointments to leverage its medicinal properties.
